era_context: The Old Kingdom of Egypt (Dynasty VI) continues under Pepi II Neferkare. The Akkadian Empire under Naram-Sin is in its imperial phase. The Indus Valley Civilization remains in its mature phase. This year falls within the broader Bronze Age.

events.title: Pepi II Neferkare continues reign in Egypt
events.description: Pepi II Neferkare's reign continues during this year. No specific events are attested for 2274 BCE in particular.

sources.name: Turin King List and Abydos King List

events.certainty_note: No specific events are documented for 2274 BCE.

disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed.
historiographic_note: 2274 BCE is a year for which no specific events are documented in surviving sources. The historical record is essentially null.
